name: Bel Air Elementary School Park
description: Bel Air Elementary School Park is a place to play pickleball in Cumberland, MD. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Belair Pickleball
description: Belair Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Cresaptown, MD. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Cumberland YMCA
description: Cumberland YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cumberland, MD. There are 7 wood and asphalt courts. 3 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are not available.
